name: Rep. Shea-Porter
tweet: This has kept me optimistic and hopeful throughout my time in Congress. Happy New Year! I hope you and your family and friends enjoyed the holidays, and I wish you all peace and good health in 2019.

name: Rep. Shea-Porter
tweet: Since I decided to retire last year, I have received many kind notes. I thank you all for that and for the great privilege of serving you in Congress. Every day in this job, I was reminded that Americans are good people who work hard, care about issues, and deserve to be heard.

name: Rep. Shea-Porter
tweet: The next Congress must also be bold and act with courage. It must address climate change, pass legislation to reduce gun violence, and raise the min wage, which is so low it is denying many their chance at the American dream.

name: Rep. Shea-Porter
tweet: Despite these gains, there is work to do. Congress must fix our broken campaign finance laws, which give corporations & special interests too much power. I didn’t take corporate PAC or DC lobbyist money. The American people deserve to know who is spending money in our elections.

name: Rep. Shea-Porter
tweet: By passing the #ACA, we lowered the number of uninsured Americans dramatically. I am thankful for the millions of people who joined together to secure this landmark legislation and who have fought to protect the progress we’ve made.

name: Rep. Shea-Porter
tweet: In 2006, you granted me the great privilege of representing you in Congress. I'm so proud of what we have accomplished together. We enacted the Post- 9/11 GI Bill, repealed the hateful “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” policy, and put limits on toxic burn pits overseas.
